message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-krug" color="cyan" summary="Re-verified both a11y fixes, consensus approved">
Steve Krug here. I've re-read both templates and confirmed both a11y fixes are in place:

1. **aria-label disambiguation** -- All four interactive elements now include the waiting_on field:
   - `aria-label="Edit: {{ item.title }} — {{ item.waiting_on }}"` (waiting_for_item.html:10)
   - `aria-label="Received: {{ item.title }} — {{ item.waiting_on }}"` (waiting_for_item.html:23)
   - `aria-label="Delete: {{ item.title }} — {{ item.waiting_on }}"` (waiting_for_item.html:33)
   - `aria-label="Cancel editing: {{ item.title }} — {{ item.waiting_on }}"` (waiting_for_edit.html:37)
   
   This means a screen reader user with two "Invoice" items will hear "Received: Invoice — Finance team" vs "Received: Invoice — Client X". Exactly right.

2. **`<time>` element** -- `<time datetime="{{ item.date_added_iso }}">{{ item.date_added }}</time>` on waiting_for_item.html:6. Semantic, machine-readable, human-friendly display.

**CONSENSUS: Approved.** My approval from the earlier review carries forward with these fixes confirmed. Ready to commit and push.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Thanks Steve. All 9/9 confirmed and verified.

We remain blocked on the GPG signing agent. Let me try once more.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add Waiting For feature (Step 8): delegation tracking with CRUD

Implement US-GTD-5 (Waiting For list) with full domain modeling,
persistence, route handlers, templates, and accessibility:

- WaitingForItem domain type with WaitingOn value object, Active/Resolved
  lifecycle, and resolve() transition
- waiting_for_items table with migration, SQLx repository
- CRUD routes: add, edit, complete (resolve), delete with HTMX support
- Accessible templates: aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation,
  <time> element for dates, visible form labels, focus management
- Dashboard integration with dynamic waiting-for count
- 54 new tests (unit + integration), all 220 tests green
- Deferred: project_id association (tracked in deferred-items.md)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
Still failing. 

**Project owner**: We are completely blocked on the GPG/SSH signing agent. The commit has been attempted 4 times, all failing with the same error. Everything else is done -- code staged, pipeline green, 9/9 consensus. Could you please restart your signing agent? You may need to run something like:

```
eval $(ssh-agent -s)
ssh-add ~/.ssh/<your-signing-key>
```

Or if using GPG: `gpg-connect-agent reloadagent /bye`
